name: VW_MONTHLY_SUMMARY
sql_statement: SELECT c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.CUSTOMER_NAME, p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_NAME, d.MONTH_ID, d.YEAR_ID, SUM(s.REVENUE) AS MONTHLY_REVENUE, SUM(s.QUANTITY) AS MONTHLY_QUANTITY FROM FACT_SALES s JOIN LU_CUSTOMER c ON s.CUSTOMER_ID = c.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN LU_PRODUCT p ON s.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID JOIN LU_DATE d ON s.DATE_ID = d.DATE_ID GROUP BY c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.CUSTOMER_NAME, p.PRODUCT_ID, p.PRODUCT_NAME, d.MONTH_ID, d.YEAR_ID
